response.justification: The candidate vastly exceeds the technical bar for an entry-level fullstack role, with strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, REST/GraphQL, SQL, Docker, and Kubernetes experience, plus AI-agent and LLM tooling that matches the nice-to-haves. The core risk is overqualification: a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years applying to a junior IC position raises real concerns about retention, salary alignment, and motivation fit. PostgreSQL specifically is not listed (MongoDB/MySQL are), and the high on-site requirement may conflict with a Bucharest/Berlin-based profile.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js, React, and database experience well beyond requirements
Hits multiple nice-to-haves: AWS, Kubernetes, LLM/AI-agent tooling
Demonstrated clean-architecture focus (TDD, CI/CD, testing advocacy)
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level role; retention and salary risk
High on-site presence required but candidate is based in Bucharest/Berlin
